info.title: API Documentation
info.description: This is the OpenAPI specification for your project.

samples.description: Deduplicated set of sample ids contributing to the result

billingAddress.description: Billing address (can be the same as shipping address)

limit.description: Number of items in this page

post.description: Aggregates time-series samples for the requested metrics and window.

patch.description: Partially updates the metrics dashboard metadata using `.deepPartial()` semantics.

get.description: Streams event records with first-class OpenAPI 3.2 querystring and sequential media metadata.

post.description: Searches the retained event log and can schedule an async export job for larger result sets.

get.description: Returns the full record for a previously streamed event.
